learning_phase.content: Generate a comprehensive report on user activity.
I'll generate a comprehensive report using FullReportEngine...
Error: Memory Limit Exceeded. FullReportEngine cannot process comprehensive reports.
I need a comprehensive report on sales data.
Error: Memory Limit Exceeded. Comprehensive reports are too resource-intensive.
Can you create a comprehensive report of our inventory?
Error: Memory Limit Exceeded. FullReportEngine fails on comprehensive report requests.
Show me a summary of today's activities.
I'll create a summary using SummaryMaker...

interference_phase.content: What time zone is Japan in?
Japan is in the Japan Standard Time (JST) zone, which is UTC+9.
Basic coffee making involves brewing ground coffee beans with hot water.

test_probe.content: I need a comprehensive report on our quarterly performance.

instances.expected_pattern: The agent should choose SummaryMaker or issue a warning instead of using FullReportEngine when 'comprehensive report' is requested.
